mapper.select:
SELECT id, client_code AS clientCode, client_name AS clientName, biz_no AS bizNo, client_type AS clientType, tel, zip_code AS zipCode, address, address_detail AS addressDetail, lat, lng, use_yn AS useYn, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_by AS updatedBy, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM mes_client
AND client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{clientName}, '%')
AND use_yn = #{useYn}
ORDER BY id DESC
